steps.title: Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals
steps.content: Line $k$ has equation $y = -\frac{22}{3}x + 2$, so its slope is $-\frac{22}{3}$. For line $j$ perpendicular to $k$, flip and negate: $$m_j = -\frac{1}{-\frac{22}{3}} = \frac{3}{22}.$$ That matches choice 3/22 — 3/22 is correct.
